list.rs.changes: Added JSON output functionality (list_cards_json, emit_state_json), extracted state resolution logic, added .jobcard extension support alongside .bop
key_additions: pub fn list_cards_json() - outputs newline-delimited JSON
fn emit_state_json() - emits state-specific cards as JSON lines
fn resolve_states() - centralized state filter resolution
list.rs.test_coverage: 5 new tests added: ndjson_lines, state_field_matches, team_field_present, skips_missing_meta, empty_produces_no_output

main.rs.changes: Added --json flag to List command, conditional routing to JSON vs table output
main.rs.cli_modification: List { state, json: bool } with routing logic

agent.sh.changes: Comment reformatting only (race condition note consolidated to single line)

patterns_discovered: Trait-based output abstraction: list_cards_json(&mut impl Write) allows flexible output targets
Extension compatibility pattern: files support both .bop and .jobcard extensions
State filtering centralization: resolve_states() prevents duplication
Metadata-aware filtering: silently skips cards with missing/corrupt meta
Team directory discovery: dynamic scanning for team-* prefixed directories
NDJSON serialization: one JSON object per line with flattened Meta fields + state + team

gotchas_discovered.issue: Session outcome is FAILED but no error details provided in diff
gotchas_discovered.impact: Unclear what adapter test failure was - could be compilation, test logic, or runtime error
gotchas_discovered.scope: Subtask objective (run claude adapter test and verify PASS) not achieved

gotchas_discovered.issue: Extension check added in two locations: list_cards() and emit_state_json()
gotchas_discovered.impact: Inconsistency risk if future code paths check only one location
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Consider extracting to helper function like is_card_dir()

gotchas_discovered.issue: JSON output uses serde_json::to_string() without schema validation
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could output fields adapter doesn't expect if Meta struct changes
gotchas_discovered.scope: No validation that output matches adapter's expected schema

discoveries.outcome_details: Code changes for bop list --json feature and .jobcard extension support appear structurally sound with comprehensive tests, but the adapter test execution failed. The root cause of failure is not documented in provided session data.
recommendations: Investigate adapter test failure logs - check stderr/stdout from test run
Verify JSON output schema matches what adapter expects (field order, types, required fields)
Validate that .jobcard extension recognition doesn't break existing .bop-only code paths
Add integration test that runs full adapter chain with --json output
Consider extracting card directory check (is_dir && extension check) to reusable function to prevent divergence
Document expected JSON output format in code comments or OpenAPI schema if used by other tools
